quote_of_day.text: MAI POORI MAANAVTA KO SHRAAP DETA HU MALE TO FEMALE RATIO CHUD JAAYE AUR 4 FEMALE PER MALE HO JAAYE FERTILITY RATE 0.5 HO JAYE SAARE BUDDHO KI HEALTH BAS ITNI THEEK RAHE KI KHUD KI GAAND DHO PAAYE AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A toxic high pressure system of caste hatred dominated the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent and dehumanizing rhetoric against low castes.

This dark front was marked by calls for brutal violence, including murder, mutilation, and other forms of harm.

A scattered drizzle of erotic asphyxiation deaths continued to fall, with Anon sharing graphic cases, including the recent death of a 24-year-old erotic model in Italy.

This thread drew a significant amount of attention, with many weighing in on the circumstances surrounding the death.

Meanwhile, a cold snap of incel anxiety and frustration gripped parts of the board, with one Anon seeking advice on transforming from an incel to a 'Chad' in just two months.

Elsewhere, a brief but intense squall of anti-Buddhist sentiment blew in, with Anon hurling insults and accusations of atheism and 'cuckery' at Buddhists. A low-pressure system of Gobarida edition mentions also made an appearance, though it was relatively weak.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Others Join In
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violence against low castes, including killing, beheading, and using them as manure. The poster listed several brutal actions, including throwing low castes into a meat grinder, using them as manure, and gassing them.

Another anon responded by blaming low castes for India's poverty and problems, stating they have ruined institutions and bureaucracy with their corruption and incompetence. This poster claimed low castes are dirty and have given India a bad reputation.

A third poster suggested allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames, then joked that low castes would rape others and blame upper castes. They claimed society would have been more stable if this had never been allowed.

One respondent brought up a case of a dalit man accused of raping a five-year-old, saying the entire 'chuddist and bhim team' abandoned him. They noted that dalits continue to rape while using upper caste surnames.

Another poster argued that India's minorities have contributed to the country except for low castes, citing examples of contributions from Sikhs, Northeast Indians, Muslims, Jains, Bengalis, and Kashmiris. They contrasted these groups with low castes.

A respondent expressed support for destroying 'rejerbhation fags' and making love to their widows. They used derogatory language to refer to people who use reservations.

Other posters discussed the history of OBCs and dalits, with one claiming that OBCs and Muslims have always hated Brahmins for not giving them Dwija status.

They also made claims about the genetics and behavior of dalits, suggesting they are prone to child rape and inbreeding.

articles.title: Anon shares cases of erotic asphyxiation deaths
articles.body:
Anon posted about a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who died during a livestream in Italy during the COVID-19 pandemic.

The model was using a high-quality pirated VPN, which delayed the discovery of his location and corpse by at least 24 hours.

Another anon shared a case from a German Forensic Medicine textbook about a 24-year-old man who intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner during a strangulation fetish session.

The 24-year-old was acting as a safe spotter but encouraged his partner to push the session further.

Anon also shared cases of individuals who died during erotic asphyxiation sessions, including a 23-year-old woman who died while her partner was masturbating and not providing assistance.

A 27-year-old man died during a LiveJasmin stream while wearing a condom, and his body was not discovered for 23 minutes.

Anons discussed how people develop an affinity for auto-erotic asphyxiation, with some suggesting that it can be induced by past traumas or behaviors.

Others noted that some individuals become aroused by imagining themselves being killed by hanging or strangulation.

The thread also included graphic descriptions of deaths and injuries related to erotic asphyxiation, with some anons expressing discomfort and pain while reading about the cases.

One anon noted that they had been watching gore videos since they were 13 but found hanging videos to be particularly uncomfortable.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation: A Debate
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the discussion by asking how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One respondent suggested that getting in shape was possible within that timeframe, but changing one's personality was a harder task, and potentially impossible for those with autism.

Anon sought advice on how to develop 'that charming pretty boy Chad vibes.' Another poster recommended a high-carb diet and exercise, specifying at least 200 grams of simple carbs daily.

One anon bluntly told the OP to 'get fucked, incel,' and provided a list of actions to take, including going to the gym, eating protein, sleeping, growing a beard, getting a haircut, and stopping habits like excessive masturbation and complaining.

A separate conversation thread emerged around the use of Hindi abuses and labels for women. Anon advised against using cheap Hindi insults, especially in front of women, and suggested identifying promiscuous women without openly labeling them.

The discussion also touched on topics like underwear types, with one poster explaining the original purpose of G-strings and thongs.

A respondent jokingly asked if simply being in shape and confident made one a 'Chad,' and another wondered what to do if they already felt like a 'Chad' but didn't know where to go from there.

The conversation was marked by its characteristic mix of advice, jokes, and blunt responses.

articles.title: Gobarida Edition Mentioned
articles.body: Anon started a thread saying "Gobarida edition". Anon sought clarification on what "Gobarida Edition" refers to, suggesting it might relate to biogas, a book, or a cultural reference. Another anon fantasized about robotic waifus, saying "Bio-mechanical Hybrid Flesh Robot waifus" would become a reality, allowing for sexual encounters without harm. Anon also discussed varna sankara and female-to-male ratios, suggesting a preference for high-IQ women.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Atheist Cuckery'
articles.body:
Anon posted that Buddhists are 'straight up atheist lol' and their religion 'literally started all cuckery.' They claimed Hinduism is superior, citing its diversity and questioning nature.

Another anon responded, calling Buddhism 'parasitism' that operates on 'bad faith and moral high horse.' A third anon noted that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognize Ambedkarite Buddhism as legitimate, viewing it as a political ideology with Buddhist flavor.

The discussion turned to the historical spread of Buddhism, with one anon mentioning that the Pala and Kushan empires were Buddhist, while another noted that Genghis Khan was a Tengrist and later Mongol rulers embraced Buddhism.
